scripts.deploy: npm run build && node scripts/postbuild.mjs && wrangler deploy
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute devmultigroup-db --local --file=./scripts/seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute devmultigroup-db --local --file=./scripts/events.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute devmultigroup-db --remote --file=./scripts/seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute devmultigroup-db --remote --file=./scripts/events.sql
scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute devmultigroup-db --local --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'"
